ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "period" TEXT /* Date period for the compliance issue */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the issue occurred */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product involved in the compliance issue */,
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reason for the compliance issue */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of reported issues */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the compliance issue */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the record */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_reason_id FOREIGN KEY ("reason_id") REFERENCES reasons ("reason_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the country was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the country information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the product manufacturer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reason */,
  "reason_description" TEXT /* Description of the reason for compliance issues */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the reason */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the compliance issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reason was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reason information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance record affected */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, country) from which the activity was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES compliance_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report if stored as a file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
